prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.1 kg; Height 174.2 cm; BMI 19.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 196mg/dL; 9 months ago 180mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 174mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.8kg; 9 months ago 59.2kg; 6 months ago 53.6kg; 3 months ago 53.7kg; current 60.1kg), Height (12 months ago 174.2cm; 9 months ago 174.2cm; 6 months ago 174.2cm; 3 months ago 174.2cm; current 174.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 80mg/g; 9 months ago 114mg/g; 6 months ago 105mg/g; 3 months ago 80mg/g; current 94mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 16.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.2g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 15.0g/dL; current 15.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.85 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
